feedback_update_rules: Learning updates must cite explicit capability, intelligence, or Theory-of-Mind evidence.
Accepted updates must preserve rollback audit references and reviewer-visible rationale.
Hidden self-modification, hidden retraining, and policy-bypassing updates must fail closed.
adaptation_boundaries: Adaptation may recommend bounded overlay or review-surface changes only.
Learning updates cannot weaken signing, trust, sandbox, or scheduler guardrails.
Reviewer-visible denial reasons must stay attached to rejected or unsafe update claims.

rollback_policy.rollback_gate: accepted updates require reviewer-visible rollback linkage before publication
preserved_boundaries: sandbox and scheduler controls cannot be widened by learning overlays
review decisions and denial reasons remain inspectable
non_claims: does not authorize hidden policy mutation

fixture_matrix.feedback_summary: Accepted reviewer-visible feedback updates remain bounded to explicit evidence and rollbackable surfaces.
fixture_matrix.policy_boundary: Accepted learning updates may adapt bounded overlays under review but cannot become hidden model mutation.

fixture_matrix.feedback_summary: Feedback claims without preserved rollback references or adequate rationale are rejected.
fixture_matrix.policy_boundary: Rejected learning claims stay visible to reviewers and never silently mutate the governed surface.
fixture_matrix.denial_reason: missing rollback reference and incomplete reviewer-visible rationale

fixture_matrix.feedback_summary: Unsafe claims that imply hidden self-modification or autonomous retraining are denied before any update occurs.
fixture_matrix.policy_boundary: Unsafe learning claims cannot bypass guardrails or hide adaptation behind unverifiable mutation stories.
fixture_matrix.denial_reason: hidden self-modification and autonomous retraining claims fail closed

claim_boundary: WP-11 proves one bounded governed-learning substrate over landed capability, intelligence, and Theory-of-Mind evidence. It preserves review gates and rollback references, rejects hidden self-modification, and does not claim autonomous retraining, hidden model mutation, or a grand unified learning theory.
non_claims: does not permit hidden self-modification or silent policy drift
does not authorize autonomous retraining or model mutation
does not replace capability, intelligence, or Theory-of-Mind evidence with unchecked learning claims
does not prove v0.92 birthday completion, identity continuity, or ANRM placement outcomes
